race.comment: Plenty of win chances. CALYX ROSE (2) could be over the odds resuming over a sharper journey. Has had one campaign for the new yard and was racing over further but looks well placed here over 1200m fresh. Sure to be primed and will be tough to stop. HOLY HOLY HOLY (7) was a former Moody-trained galloper who trialled but never raced in Victoria before making debut this area with a strong maiden win. Has upside and is aided by the claim again. Can make it back-to-back wins. CUP OF AMBITION (4) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when 4 lengths away in third over 1200m at Mt Isa. Close to a win and gets chance. SALTCLAY (8) is racing well scoring the maiden win here two back then fourth last time when dropping back to 1000m. Extra trip a plus and should take catching. VALIANT JOAN (10) placed here last time and shouldn't be far away again.
